---
title: "Homepage"
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/YWang_jmphoto_76kb.jpg
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    # - icon: github
    #   text: Github
    #   href: https://github.com/yanghaowang
    #   target: _blank
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yanghaowang/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:wyangh90@gmail.com
      target: _blank
listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  max-items: 5
  fields: [date, title, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

:::{#hero-heading}
I am an Applied Economist working in the tech and retail space, exploring the intersection of data science and customer behavior.

Specializing in structural modeling and causal inference, I build robust empirical tools to solve real-world challenges. Currently, my work centers on developing marketing measurement solutions, such as Media Mix Models (MMM) and Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), and designing rigorous experiments that empower data-driven business decisions.
:::

<br>

## Recent Posts
:::{#recent-posts}
:::
<hr style="border: none; border-top: 1px solid #dee2e6; opacity: 1;">

<div style="text-align: right; margin-top: 20px;">
  <a href="blog.qmd" class="btn btn-primary" role="button">>> More Posts</a>
</div>
